• Restonposted onPosted TodayJR-0105395Sr Manager Core Software (US Federal)remote typeFlexlocationsUSA, VA, McLeanposted onPosted 30+ Days AgoJR-0103019Agent Development Engineer - Agent Platformremote typeFlexlocations2 Locationsposted onPosted 3 Days AgoJR-0106274Software Development Engineer, DevOps - Lifecycle Platform (US Federal)remote typeFlexlocationsUSA, VA, McLeanposted onPosted 30+ Days AgoJR-0097425Principal Full Stack Engineer - Agent Platformremote typeFlexlocations2 Locationsposted onPosted 3 Days AgoJR-0106270Principal Agent Development Engineer - Agent Platformremote typeFlexlocations2 Locationsposted onPosted 3 Days AgoJR-0106234Full Stack Development Engineer- US Federal (REACT/XO)remote typeFlexlocationsUSA, GA, Atlantaposted onPosted TodayJR-0106446Sr.

• You will manage sprint cycles, define technical requirements in Jira, and oversee the end-to-end lifecycle of the tools you build.
• Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Systems, or a related technical field.
• OR equivalent practical, hands-on experience in lieu of a degree Conduct code reviews on peer-built AI tools and own enhancement of deployed solutions based on user feedback and evolving business needs Strong communication skills.
• 4+ years in a technical role — software development, product ownership, technical program management, or similar Translate operational needs into working prototypes and iterate based on user feedback until adoption sticks Demonstrated experience building with AI-assisted coding tools (Cursor, Codex, Claude Code, or equivalent) Working knowledge of prompt engineering, AI agent design, and LLM application development.
• Rapidly build working knowledge of Facilities operations — how capital projects are planned, budgeted, tracked, and delivered — by shadowing project managers, construction teams, and operations staff to find automation opportunities that aren't on anyone's roadmap yet Own the Full SDLC by applying traditional product development rigor to AI-generated code.
• Equally comfortable in a whiteboard session with leadership or a working session with project teams Strong foundational knowledge of Agile methodologies, version control (Git), code reviews, and secure deployment pipelines.
